 12450    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12451    def change_file_extensions(self, folder: str, from_extension: str, to_extension: str, recursive: bool, ignore_case: 
 02452        extension_to_compare: str = None
 02453        if ignore_case:
 02454            extension_to_compare = from_extension.lower()
 2455        else:
 02456            extension_to_compare = from_extension
 02457        for file in GeneralUtilities.get_direct_files_of_folder(folder):
 02458            if (ignore_case and file.lower().endswith(f".{extension_to_compare}") or not ignore_case and file.endswith(f
 02459                p = Path(file)
 02460                p.rename(p.with_suffix('.'+to_extension))
 02461        if recursive:
 02462            for subfolder in GeneralUtilities.get_direct_folders_of_folder(folder):
 02463                self.change_file_extensions(subfolder, from_extension, to_extension, recursive, ignore_case)

 12465    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12466    def __add_chapter(self, main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, number: int, chaptertitle: str, content: str 
 02467        if content is None:
 02468            content = "TXDX add content here"
 02469        filename = str(number).zfill(2)+"_"+chaptertitle.replace(' ', '-')
 02470        file = f"{reference_content_folder}/{filename}.md"
 02471        full_title = f"{number}. {chaptertitle}"
 2472
 02473        GeneralUtilities.append_line_to_file(main_reference_file, f"- [{full_title}](./{filename}.md)")
 2474
 02475        GeneralUtilities.ensure_file_exists(file)
 02476        GeneralUtilities.write_text_to_file(file, f"""# {full_title}
 2477
 2478{content}
 2479""".replace("XDX", "ODO"))
 2480
 12481    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12482    def generate_arc42_reference_template(self, repository: str, productname: str = None, subfolder: str = None):
 2483        productname: str
 02484        if productname is None:
 02485            productname = os.path.basename(repository)
 02486        if subfolder is None:
 02487            subfolder = "Other/Reference"
 02488        reference_root_folder = f"{repository}/{subfolder}"
 02489        reference_content_folder = reference_root_folder + "/Technical"
 02490        if os.path.isdir(reference_root_folder):
 02491            raise ValueError(f"The folder '{reference_root_folder}' does already exist.")
 02492        GeneralUtilities.ensure_directory_exists(reference_root_folder)
 02493        GeneralUtilities.ensure_directory_exists(reference_content_folder)
 02494        main_reference_file = f"{reference_root_folder}/Reference.md"
 02495        GeneralUtilities.ensure_file_exists(main_reference_file)
 02496        GeneralUtilities.write_text_to_file(main_reference_file, f"""# {productname}
 2497
 2498TXDX add minimal service-description here.
 2499
 2500## Technical documentation
 2501
 2502""".replace("XDX", "ODO"))
 02503        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 1, 'Introduction and Goals', """## Overview
 2504
 2505TXDX
 2506
 2507## Quality goals
 2508
 2509TXDX
 2510
 2511## Stakeholder
 2512
 2513| Name | How to contact | Reason |
 2514| ---- | -------------- | ------ |""")
 02515        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 2, 'Constraints', """## Technical constraints
 2516
 2517| Constraint-identifier | Constraint | Reason |
 2518| --------------------- | ---------- | ------ |
 2519
 2520## Organizational constraints
 2521
 2522| Constraint-identifier | Constraint | Reason |
 2523| --------------------- | ---------- | ------ |""")
 02524        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 3, 'Context and Scope', """## Context
 2525
 2526TXDX
 2527
 2528## Scope
 2529
 2530TXDX""")
 02531        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 4, 'Solution Strategy', """TXDX""")
 02532        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 5, 'Building Block View', """TXDX""")
 02533        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 6, 'Runtime View', """TXDX""")
 02534        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 7, 'Deployment View', """## Infrastructure-ove
 2535
 2536TXDX
 2537
 2538## Infrastructure-requirements
 2539
 2540TXDX
 2541
 2542## Deployment-proecsses
 2543
 2544TXDX""")
 02545        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 8, 'Crosscutting Concepts', """TXDX""")
 02546        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 9, 'Architectural Decisions', """## Decision-b
 2547
 2548| Decision-identifier | Date | Decision | Reason and notes |
 2549| ------------------- | ---- | -------- | ---------------- |""")  # empty because there are no decsions yet
 02550        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 10, 'Quality Requirements', """TXDX""")
 02551        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 11, 'Risks and Technical Debt', """## Risks
 2552
 2553Currently there are no known risks.
 2554
 2555## Technical debts
 2556
 2557Currently there are no technical depts.""")
 02558        self.__add_chapter(main_reference_file, reference_content_folder, 12, 'Glossary', """## Terms
 2559
 2560| Term | Meaning |
 2561| ---- | ------- |
 2562
 2563## Abbreviations
 2564
 2565| Abbreviation | Meaning |
 2566| ------------ | ------- |""")
 2567
 02568        GeneralUtilities.append_to_file(main_reference_file, """
 2569
 2570## Responsibilities
 2571
 2572| Responsibility  | Name and contact-information |
 2573| --------------- | ---------------------------- |
 2574| Pdocut-owner    | TXDX                         |
 2575| Product-manager | TXDX                         |
 2576| Support         | TXDX                         |
 2577
 2578## License & Pricing
 2579
 2580TXDX
 2581
 2582## External resources
 2583
 2584- [Repository](TXDX)
 2585- [Productive-System](TXDX)
 2586- [QualityCheck-system](TXDX)
 2587""".replace("XDX", "ODO"))

 12589    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12590    def run_with_timeout(self, method, timeout_in_seconds: float) -> bool:
 2591        # Returns true if the method was terminated due to a timeout
 2592        # Returns false if the method terminates in the given time
 02593        p = multiprocessing.Process(target=method)
 02594        p.start()
 02595        p.join(timeout_in_seconds)
 02596        if p.is_alive():
 02597            p.kill()
 02598            p.join()
 02599            return True
 2600        else:
 02601            return False
 2602
 12603    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12604    def ensure_local_docker_network_exists(self, network_name: str) -> None:
 02605        if not self.local_docker_network_exists(network_name):
 02606            self.create_local_docker_network(network_name)
 2607
 12608    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12609    def ensure_local_docker_network_does_not_exist(self, network_name: str) -> None:
 02610        if self.local_docker_network_exists(network_name):
 02611            self.remove_local_docker_network(network_name)
 2612
 12613    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12614    def local_docker_network_exists(self, network_name: str) -> bool:
 02615        return network_name in self.get_all_local_existing_docker_networks()
 2616
 12617    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12618    def get_all_local_existing_docker_networks(self) -> list[str]:
 02619        program_call_result = self.run_program("docker", "network list")
 02620        std_out = program_call_result[1]
 02621        std_out_lines = std_out.split("\n")[1:]
 02622        result: list[str] = []
 02623        for std_out_line in std_out_lines:
 02624            normalized_line = ';'.join(std_out_line.split())
 02625            splitted = normalized_line.split(";")
 02626            result.append(splitted[1])
 02627        return result
 2628
 12629    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12630    def remove_local_docker_network(self, network_name: str) -> None:
 02631        self.run_program("docker", f"network remove {network_name}")
 2632
 12633    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12634    def create_local_docker_network(self, network_name: str) -> None:
 02635        self.run_program("docker", f"network create {network_name}")
 2636
 12637    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12638    def format_xml_file(self, file: str,add_xml_declaration:bool=True) -> None:
 02639        encoding = "utf-8"
 02640        element = ET.XML(GeneralUtilities.read_text_from_file(file, encoding))
 02641        def trim_texts(elem: ET.Element):
 02642            if elem.text:
 02643                elem.text = elem.text.strip()
 02644            if elem.tail:
 02645                elem.tail = elem.tail.strip()
 02646            for child in elem:
 02647                trim_texts(child)
 02648        trim_texts(element)
 02649        ET.indent(element)
 02650        content = ET.tostring(element, xml_declaration=add_xml_declaration, encoding="unicode")
 02651        GeneralUtilities.write_text_to_file(file, content.rstrip("\n") + "\n", encoding)
 2652
 12653    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12654    def format_html_file(self, file: str, add_html_declaration: bool = False) -> None:
 02655        encoding = "utf-8"
 02656        content = GeneralUtilities.read_text_from_file(file, encoding)
 02657        content=self.format_html_content(content, add_html_declaration)
 02658        GeneralUtilities.write_text_to_file(file, content, encoding)
 2659
 12660    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12661    def format_html_content(self, content: str, add_html_declaration: bool = False) -> str:
 2662
 12663        VOID_ELEMENTS = {"area", "base", "br", "col", "embed", "hr", "img", "input",
 2664                         "link", "meta", "param", "source", "track", "wbr"}
 2665
 12666        class _Node:
 12667            __slots__ = ("tag", "attrs", "children", "text", "is_void", "raw")
 12668            def __init__(self, tag=None, attrs=(), text=None, is_void=False, raw=None):
 12669                self.tag = tag
 12670                self.attrs = list(attrs)
 12671                self.children = []
 12672                self.text = text
 12673                self.is_void = is_void
 12674                self.raw = raw
 2675
 12676        class _Builder(HTMLParser):
 12677            def __init__(self):
 12678                super().__init__(convert_charrefs=False)
 12679                self.root = _Node()
 12680                self.stack = [self.root]
 2681
 12682            def _top(self):
 12683                return self.stack[-1]
 2684
 12685            def handle_starttag(self, tag, attrs):
 12686                raw = self.get_starttag_text()
 12687                raw_lower = raw.lower()
 12688                original_attrs = []
 12689                pos = 1 + len(tag)
 12690                for lc_name, value in attrs:
 12691                    idx = raw_lower.index(lc_name, pos)
 12692                    original_attrs.append((raw[idx:idx + len(lc_name)], value))
 12693                    pos = idx + len(lc_name)
 12694                node = _Node(tag=tag, attrs=original_attrs, is_void=tag.lower() in VOID_ELEMENTS)
 12695                self._top().children.append(node)
 12696                if not node.is_void:
 12697                    self.stack.append(node)
 2698
 12699            def handle_endtag(self, tag):
 12700                if len(self.stack) > 1 and self.stack[-1].tag == tag:
 12701                    self.stack.pop()
 2702
 12703            def handle_data(self, data):
 12704                t = " ".join(data.split())
 12705                if t:
 12706                    self._top().children.append(_Node(text=t))
 2707
 12708            def handle_entityref(self, name):
 02709                self._top().children.append(_Node(text=f"&{name};"))
 2710
 12711            def handle_charref(self, name):
 02712                self._top().children.append(_Node(text=f"&#{name};"))
 2713
 12714            def handle_comment(self, data):
 02715                self._top().children.append(_Node(raw=f"<!--{data}-->"))
 2716
 12717            def handle_decl(self, decl):
 02718                self._top().children.append(_Node(raw=f"<!{decl}>"))
 2719
 12720            def handle_pi(self, data):
 02721                self._top().children.append(_Node(raw=f"<?{data}>"))
 2722
 12723        _angular_exprs: list[str] = []
 2724
 12725        def _protect_angular(m: re.Match) -> str:
 02726            idx = len(_angular_exprs)
 02727            _angular_exprs.append(m.group(0))
 02728            return f"__ANGEXPR{idx}__"
 2729
 12730        protected = re.sub(r'\{\{[\s\S]*?\}\}', _protect_angular, content)
 12731        builder = _Builder()
 12732        builder.feed(protected)
 12733        ind = "  "
 2734
 12735        def _serialize(node: _Node, depth: int) -> list:
 12736            prefix = ind * depth
 12737            if node.raw is not None:
 02738                return [prefix + node.raw]
 12739            if node.text is not None:
 02740                return [node.text]
 12741            if node.tag is None:
 12742                out = []
 12743                for c in node.children:
 12744                    out.extend(_serialize(c, depth))
 12745                return out
 12746            attr_str = "".join(f" {n}" if v is None else f' {n}="{v}"' for n, v in node.attrs)
 12747            if node.is_void:
 02748                return [f"{prefix}<{node.tag}{attr_str}>"]
 12749            has_elem_children = any(c.tag is not None for c in node.children)
 12750            if not has_elem_children:
 12751                inner = "".join(c.text or "" for c in node.children)
 12752                return [f"{prefix}<{node.tag}{attr_str}>{inner}</{node.tag}>"]
 12753            lines = [f"{prefix}<{node.tag}{attr_str}>"]
 12754            for c in node.children:
 12755                child_lines = _serialize(c, depth + 1)
 12756                if c.text is not None:
 02757                    lines.append(ind * (depth + 1) + child_lines[0])
 2758                else:
 12759                    lines.extend(child_lines)
 12760            lines.append(f"{prefix}</{node.tag}>")
 12761            return lines
 2762
 12763        result = "\n".join(line for line in _serialize(builder.root, 0) if line.strip())
 12764        for i, expr in enumerate(_angular_exprs):
 02765            result = result.replace(f"__ANGEXPR{i}__", expr)
 12766        if add_html_declaration and not result.lstrip().startswith("<!DOCTYPE"):
 12767            result = "<!DOCTYPE html>\n" + result
 12768        return result
 2769
 12770    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12771    def get_pip_index_url_arguments_from_local_cache(self)->list[str]:
 02772        arguments=[]
 02773        pip_folder=GeneralUtilities.normalize_path(self.get_global_cache_folder()+"/Pip")
 02774        if os.path.isdir(pip_folder):
 02775            main_index_file=GeneralUtilities.normalize_path(os.path.join(pip_folder, "MainIndex.txt"))
 02776            if os.path.isfile(main_index_file):
 02777                lines=GeneralUtilities.read_nonempty_lines_from_file(main_index_file)
 02778                url=[line for line in lines if line.startswith("IndexURL: ")][0].split(":")[1].strip()
 02779                arguments.append("--index-url")
 02780                arguments.append(url)
 02781            extra_index_folder=GeneralUtilities.normalize_path(os.path.join(pip_folder, "ExtraIndexURLs"))
 02782            if os.path.isdir(extra_index_folder):
 02783                index_files=GeneralUtilities.get_direct_files_of_folder(extra_index_folder)
 02784                if len(index_files) > 0:
 02785                    for indexurl_file in index_files:
 02786                        lines=GeneralUtilities.read_nonempty_lines_from_file(indexurl_file)
 02787                        url=[line for line in lines if line.startswith("IndexURL: ")][0].split(":")[1].strip()
 02788                        arguments.append("--extra-index-url")
 02789                        arguments.append(url)
 02790        return arguments
 2791
 12792    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12793    def install_requirementstxt_file(self, requirements_txt_file: str):
 02794        folder: str = os.path.dirname(requirements_txt_file)
 02795        filename: str = os.path.basename(requirements_txt_file)
 02796        arguments= ["install", "-r", filename]
 02797        for argument in self.get_pip_index_url_arguments_from_local_cache():
 02798            arguments.append(argument)
 02799        self.run_program_argsasarray("pip", arguments, folder,print_live_output=self.log.loglevel==LogLevel.Debug)
 2800
 12801    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12802    def ocr_analysis_of_folder_using_local_docker_image(self, folder: str, extensions: list[str], languages: list[str],b
 2803        #TODO start docker server
 02804        serviceaddress:str=None#TODO

 2806        #TODO stop docker server
 2807
 12808    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12809    def ocr_analysis_of_folder(self, folder: str, serviceaddress: str, extensions: list[str], languages: list[str],base_
 02810        supported_extensions = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'tiff', 'bmp', 'gif', 'pdf', 'docx', 'doc', 'xlsx', 'xls', 'pptx',
 02811        changes_files: list[str] = []
 02812        if base_folder_for_entry is None:
 02813            base_folder_for_entry=folder
 02814        if extensions is None:
 02815            extensions = supported_extensions
 02816        for file in GeneralUtilities.get_direct_files_of_folder(folder):
 02817            if GeneralUtilities.is_ignored_by_glob_pattern(os.path.dirname(file),file,ignore_pattern):
 02818                continue
 02819            file_lower = file.lower()
 02820            for extension in extensions:
 02821                if file_lower.endswith("."+extension):
 02822                    if self.ocr_analysis_of_file(file, serviceaddress, languages,base_folder_for_entry):
 02823                        changes_files.append(file)
 02824                    break
 02825        for subfolder in GeneralUtilities.get_direct_folders_of_folder(folder):
 02826            if GeneralUtilities.is_ignored_by_glob_pattern(os.path.dirname(subfolder),subfolder,ignore_pattern):
 02827                continue
 02828            for file in self.ocr_analysis_of_folder(subfolder, serviceaddress, extensions, languages,base_folder_for_ent
 02829                changes_files.append(file)
 02830        return changes_files
 2831
 2832
 12833    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12834    def __it_supported_extension(self, file: str, supported_extensions: list[str]) -> bool:
 02835        file_lower = file.lower()
 02836        for extension in supported_extensions:
 02837            if file_lower.endswith("."+extension):
 02838                return True
 02839        return False
 2840
 12841    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12842    def ocr_analysis_of_file(self, file: str, serviceaddress: str, languages: list[str], readable_folder_entry:str ) -> 
 02843        supported_extensions = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'tiff', 'bmp', 'webp', 'gif', 'pdf', 'rtf', 'docx', 'doc', 'odt', 
 02844        if not self.__it_supported_extension(file, supported_extensions):
 02845            raise ValueError(f"File '{file}' is not supported due to unsupported extension. Supported extensions are: {'
 02846        target_file = file+".ocr.txt"
 02847        hash_of_current_file: str = GeneralUtilities.get_sha256_of_file(file)
 02848        try:
 02849            if os.path.isfile(target_file):
 02850                lines = GeneralUtilities.read_lines_from_file(target_file)
 02851                previous_hash_of_current_file: str = lines[1].split(":")[1].strip()
 02852                if hash_of_current_file == previous_hash_of_current_file:
 02853                    return False
 02854        except:
 02855            pass
 02856        GeneralUtilities.write_message_to_stdout(f"Starting OCR-analysis of file \"{file}\"...")
 02857        ocr_content = self.get_ocr_content_of_file(file, serviceaddress, languages)
 02858        GeneralUtilities.ensure_file_exists(target_file)
 02859        if readable_folder_entry is None:
 02860            readable_folder_entry="."
 02861        readable_folder_entry=readable_folder_entry.replace("\\", "/")
 02862        GeneralUtilities.write_text_to_file(target_file, f"""Name of file: \"{readable_folder_entry}/{os.path.basename(f
 2863Hash of file: {hash_of_current_file}
 2864OCR-content:
 2865{ocr_content}""")
 02866        return True
 2867
 12868    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12869    def get_ocr_content_of_file(self, file: str, serviceaddress: str, languages: list[str]) -> str:
 02870        result: str = None
 02871        extension = Path(file).suffix[1:]
 02872        mime_types = {
 2873            "pdf": "application/pdf",
 2874            "png": "image/png",
 2875            "jpg": "image/jpeg",
 2876            "jpeg": "image/jpeg",
 2877            "txt": "text/plain",
 2878            "json": "application/json",
 2879            "doc": "application/msword",
 2880            "docx": "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document",
 2881            "xls": "application/vnd.ms-excel",
 2882            "xlsx": "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
 2883        }
 02884        if serviceaddress is None:
 02885            server_url_file:str= GeneralUtilities.normalize_path(f"{str(Path.home())}/.ScriptCollection/OCR/ServiceURL.t
 02886            if os.path.isfile(server_url_file):
 02887                for line in GeneralUtilities.read_nonempty_lines_from_file(server_url_file):
 02888                    if not line.startswith("#"):
 02889                        serviceaddress = line.strip()
 02890                        break
 02891        GeneralUtilities.assert_not_null(serviceaddress, "ocr-service-address must not be null.")
 02892        mime_type = mime_types.get(extension.lower(), "application/octet-stream")
 02893        service_url: str = f"{serviceaddress}/API/v1/SimpleOCR/GetOCRContent?mimeType={mime_type}"
 02894        for language in languages:
 02895            service_url = service_url + f"&languages={language}"
 02896        headers = {'Cache-Control': 'no-cache'}
 02897        with open(file, "rb") as f:
 02898            files_to_analyse = {
 2899                "fileContent": (os.path.basename(file), f, mime_type)
 2900            }
 02901            r = requests.put(service_url, timeout=3600, headers=headers, files=files_to_analyse,verify=True)
 02902            if r.status_code != 200:
 02903                if r.status_code == 400:
 02904                    return f"Could not calculate ocr-content for file \"{file}\". File may be broken."
 2905                else:
 02906                    raise ValueError(f"Retrieving ocr-content for file \"{file}\" resulted in HTTP-response-code {r.stat
 2907
 02908            result = GeneralUtilities.bytes_to_string(r.content)
 02909        return result
 2910
 12911    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12912    def ocr_analysis_of_repository(self, folder: str, serviceaddress: str, extensions: list[str], languages: list[str]) 
 02913        self.assert_is_git_repository(folder)
 02914        self.ocr_analysis_of_folder(folder, serviceaddress, extensions, languages,".",[".git"])
 2915
 12916    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12917    def update_timestamp_in_file(self, target_file: str) -> None:
 02918        lines = GeneralUtilities.read_lines_from_file(target_file)
 02919        new_lines = []
 02920        prefix: str = "# last update: "
 02921        for line in lines:
 02922            if line.startswith(prefix):
 02923                new_lines.append(prefix+GeneralUtilities.datetime_to_string_for_readable_entry(GeneralUtilities.get_now(
 2924            else:
 02925                new_lines.append(line)
 02926        GeneralUtilities.write_lines_to_file(target_file, new_lines)
 2927
 12928    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12929    def do_and_log_task(self, name_of_task: str, task,log_end_of_Task:bool=True)->int:
 02930        try:
 02931            self.log.log(f"Start action \"{name_of_task}\".", LogLevel.Information)
 02932            result = task()
 02933            if result is None:
 02934                result = 0
 02935            return result
 02936        except Exception as e:
 02937            self.log.log_exception(f"Error while running action \"{name_of_task}\".", e, LogLevel.Error)
 02938            return 1
 2939        finally:
 02940            if log_end_of_Task:
 02941                self.log.log(f"Finished action \"{name_of_task}\".", LogLevel.Information)
 2942
 2943
 12944    default_excluded_patterns_for_loc: list[str] = ["**.txt", "**.md", "**.svg", "**.xlf", "**.vscode", "**/Resources/**
 2945
 12946    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12947    def get_lines_of_code_with_default_excluded_patterns(self, repository: str) -> int:
 02948        return self.get_lines_of_code(repository, self.default_excluded_patterns_for_loc)
 2949
 12950    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12951    def get_lines_of_code(self, repository: str, excluded_pattern: list[str]) -> int:
 02952        self.assert_is_git_repository(repository)
 02953        result: int = 0
 02954        self.log.log(f"Calculate lines of code in repository '{repository}' with excluded patterns: {', '.join(excluded_
 02955        git_response = self.run_program("git", "ls-files", repository)
 02956        files: list[str] = GeneralUtilities.string_to_lines(git_response[1])
 02957        for file in files:
 02958            if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(repository, file)):
 02959                if self.__is_excluded_by_glob_pattern(file, excluded_pattern):
 02960                    self.log.log(f"File '{file}' is ignored because it matches an excluded pattern.",LogLevel.Diagnostic
 2961                else:
 02962                    full_file: str = os.path.join(repository, file)
 02963                    if GeneralUtilities.is_binary_file(full_file):
 02964                        self.log.log(f"File '{file}' is ignored because it is a binary-file.",LogLevel.Diagnostic)
 2965                    else:
 02966                        self.log.log(f"Count lines of file '{file}'.",LogLevel.Diagnostic)
 02967                        length = len(GeneralUtilities.read_nonempty_lines_from_file(full_file))
 02968                        result = result+length
 2969            else:
 02970                self.log.log(f"File '{file}' is ignored because it does not exist.",LogLevel.Diagnostic)
 02971        return result
 2972
 12973    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12974    def __is_excluded_by_glob_pattern(self, file: str, excluded_patterns: list[str]) -> bool:
 02975        for pattern in excluded_patterns:
 02976            if fnmatch.fnmatch(file, pattern):
 02977                return True
 02978        return False
 2979
 12980    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12981    def create_zip_archive(self, folder:str,zip_file:str) -> None:
 02982        GeneralUtilities.assert_folder_exists(folder)
 02983        GeneralUtilities.assert_file_does_not_exist(zip_file)
 02984        folder = os.path.abspath(folder)
 02985        with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_file, "w", zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zipf:
 02986            for root, _, files in os.walk(folder):
 02987                for file in files:
 02988                    file_path = os.path.join(root, file)
 02989                    arcname = os.path.relpath(file_path, start=folder)
 02990                    zipf.write(file_path, arcname)
 2991
 12992    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 12993    def start_local_test_service(self, file: str):
 02994        example_folder = os.path.dirname(file)
 02995        docker_compose_file = os.path.join(example_folder, "docker-compose.yml")
 02996        for service in self.get_services_from_yaml_file(docker_compose_file):
 02997            self.kill_docker_container(service)
 02998        example_name = os.path.basename(example_folder)
 02999        title = f"Test{example_name}"
 03000        argument=f"compose -p {title.lower()}"
 03001        if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(example_folder,"Parameters.env")):
 03002            argument=argument+" --env-file Parameters.env"
 03003        argument=argument+" up --detach"
 03004        self.run_program("docker", argument, example_folder, title=title,print_live_output=True)
 3005
 13006    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments

 03011        self.run_program("docker", f"compose -p {title.lower()} down", example_folder, title=title,print_live_output=Tru

 13013    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments

 03017        loglevelMap = {
 3018            LogLevel.Error: "error",
 3019            LogLevel.Warning: "warn",
 3020            LogLevel.Information: "info",
 3021            LogLevel.Debug: "debug",
 3022        }
 03023        if self.log.loglevel==LogLevel.Debug:
 03024            argument=f"-l {loglevelMap[self.log.loglevel]} {argument}"
 03025        self.run_with_epew("vl2svg",argument,workingfolder,encode_argument_in_base64=True)
 3026        #this uses vega-light. to use vega "vg2svg" should be used instead.

 3033            throw_exception_if_exitcode_is_not_zero=True
 3034        )

 3036

 03039        return data[0]

 13041    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13042    def container_is_exists(self,container_name:str)->bool:
 03043        program_result = self.run_program(
 3044            "docker",
 3045            f"inspect {container_name}",
 3046            throw_exception_if_exitcode_is_not_zero=False
 3047        )
 03048        return program_result[0]==0
 3049
 13050    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13051    def container_is_running(self,container_name:str)->bool:
 03052        data = self.inspect_container( container_name)
 03053        if data is None:
 03054            return False
 3055
 03056        return data["State"]["Status"] == "running"
 3057
 13058    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13059    def container_is_healthy(self,container_name:str)->bool:
 03060        data = self.inspect_container( container_name)
 03061        if data is None:
 03062            return False
 3063
 03064        state = data["State"]
 03065        health = state.get("Health")
 3066
 03067        if health is None:
 03068            return False  # kein HEALTHCHECK definiert
 3069
 03070        return health["Status"] == "healthy"
 3071
 13072    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13073    def get_output_of_container(self,container_name:str)->str:
 3074
 03075        program_result= self.run_program_argsasarray(
 3076            "docker",
 3077            ["logs",container_name],
 3078            throw_exception_if_exitcode_is_not_zero=False
 3079        )
 03080        exit_code=program_result[0]
 03081        stdout=program_result[1]
 03082        stderr=program_result[2]
 03083        if exit_code != 0:
 03084            return ""
 3085
 03086        return stdout+"\n"+stderr
 3087
 13088    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13089    def container_is_running_and_healthy(self,container_name:str)->bool:
 03090        if not self.container_is_exists(container_name):
 03091            return False
 03092        if not self.container_is_running(container_name):
 03093            return False
 03094        if not self.container_is_healthy(container_name):
 03095            return False
 03096        return True
 3097
 13098    def reclaim_space_from_docker(self,remove_containers:bool,remove_volumes:bool,remove_images:bool, amount_of_attempts
 03099        self.log.log("Reclaim disk space from docker...",LogLevel.Debug)
 03100        if remove_containers:
 03101            self.run_program_with_retry("docker","container prune -f",amount_of_attempts=amount_of_attempts)
 03102        if remove_volumes:
 03103            self.run_program_with_retry("docker","volume prune -f",amount_of_attempts=amount_of_attempts)
 03104        if remove_images:
 03105            self.run_program_with_retry("docker","image prune -a -f",amount_of_attempts=amount_of_attempts)
 03106        self.run_program_with_retry("docker","builder prune -a -f",amount_of_attempts=amount_of_attempts)
 03107        self.run_program_with_retry("docker","buildx prune -a -f",amount_of_attempts=amount_of_attempts,throw_exception_
 03108        self.run_program_with_retry("docker","system df",print_live_output=self.log.loglevel==LogLevel.Debug,amount_of_a
 3109
 13110    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13111    def get_docker_networks(self)->list[str]:
 03112        program_result=self.run_program("docker","network list")
 03113        result=[]
 03114        lines=program_result[1].split("\n")[1:]
 03115        for line in lines:
 03116            splitted=[item for item in line.split(' ') if GeneralUtilities.string_has_content(item)]
 03117            result.append(splitted[1].replace("\n","").replace("\r","").strip())
 03118        return result
 3119

 03130            self.run_program("docker",f"network rm {network_name}")

 13132    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13133    def get_available_cultures_for_angular_app(self,angular_json_file:str)->list[str]:
 03134        languages = ["en"]
 03135        with open(angular_json_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 03136            data = json.load(f)
 03137        for project in data.get("projects", {}).values():
 03138            i18n = project.get("i18n", {})
 03139            locales = i18n.get("locales", {})
 03140            languages.extend(locales.keys())
 3141
 03142        languages=list(languages)
 03143        return languages

 13145    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13146    def parse_tasks_from_codeworkspace_file(self,code_workspace_file:str)->list[VSCodeWorkspaceShellTask]:
 03147        result=[]
 03148        jsoncontent = json.loads(GeneralUtilities.read_text_from_file(code_workspace_file))
 03149        tasks = jsoncontent["tasks"]["tasks"]
 03150        for task in tasks:
 03151            if task["type"] == "shell":
 03152                label: str = task["label"]
 03153                name: str = GeneralUtilities.to_pascal_case(label)
 03154                command:str= task["command"]
 03155                work_dir:str = None
 3156
 03157                if "options" in task:
 03158                    options = task["options"]
 03159                    if "cwd" in options:
 03160                        work_dir = options["cwd"]
 03161                        work_dir = work_dir.replace("${workspaceFolder}", ".")
 3162
 03163                command_with_args = command
 03164                if "args" in task:
 03165                    args = task["args"]
 03166                    if len(args) > 1:
 03167                        command_with_args = f"{command_with_args} {' '.join(args)}"
 3168
 03169                description: str =None
 03170                if "description" in task:
 03171                    description =  f'{label} ({task["description"]})'
 3172                else:
 03173                    description =  label
 3174
 3175
 03176                alias_list:list[str]=[]
 03177                name_lower=name.lower()
 03178                if name!=name.lower():
 03179                    alias_list.append(name_lower)
 3180
 03181                if "aliases" in task:
 03182                    aliases = task["aliases"]
 03183                    for alias in aliases:
 03184                        alias_list.append(alias)
 3185
 03186                allow_custom_arguments:bool=False
 03187                if "allowcustomarguments" in task:
 03188                    allow_custom_arguments = task["allowcustomarguments"]
 3189
 03190                result.append(VSCodeWorkspaceShellTask(name, description, work_dir, command_with_args, alias_list, allow
 03191        return result
 3192
 13193    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13194    def parse_mongodbconnection_from_codeworkspace_file(self,code_workspace_file:str)->list[VSCodeWorkspaceMongoDBConnec

 13215    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13216    def is_xliff2_file(self,file: str) -> bool:
 03217        tree = ET.parse(file)
 03218        root = tree.getroot()
 3219
 03220        tag = root.tag  # "{urn:oasis:names:tc:xliff:document:2.0}xliff"
 3221
 03222        if tag.startswith("{"):
 03223            namespace, localname = tag[1:].split("}", 1)
 3224        else:
 03225            namespace = None
 03226            localname = tag
 3227
 03228        if localname != "xliff":
 03229            return False
 3230
 03231        if namespace != "urn:oasis:names:tc:xliff:document:2.0":
 03232            return False
 3233
 03234        if root.get("version") != "2.0":
 03235            return False
 3236
 03237        return True
 3238
 13239    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13240    def __sync_xlf2_files(self,base_file:ET.ElementTree, language_files:dict [
 3241        str,#filepath
 3242        ET.ElementTree#parsed file
 3243        ]):
 3244        """This function assumes that all files are valid xliff2 files and that the base file is the reference for synci
 3245        This function adds new entries from the base file to the language files if they do not already exist using the v
 3246        This function removes entries from the language files if they do not exist in the base file anymore.
 3247        In the end the updated language files are written to the disk. The base file is not changed."""
 3248        #The file which was parsed looks like:
 3249        #<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
 3250        #<xliff version="2.0" xmlns="urn:oasis:names:tc:xliff:document:2.0" srcLang="en">
 3251        #  <file id="ngi18n" original="ng.template">
 3252        #    <unit id="logingreeting">
 3253        #      <notes>
 3254        #        <note category="location">src/app/modules/home-page/login-form/login-form.component.html:2,4</note>
 3255        #      </notes>
 3256        #      <segment>
 3257        #        <source>Welcome back, please login</source>
 3258        #      </segment>
 3259        #    </unit>
 3260        #    <unit id="username">
 3261        #      <notes>
 3262        #        <note category="location">src/app/modules/home-page/login-form/login-form.component.html:5,6</note>
 3263        #      </notes>
 3264        #      <segment>
 3265        #        <source>Username</source>
 3266        #      </segment>
 3267        #    </unit>
 3268        #    <unit id="password">
 3269        #      <notes>
 3270        #        <note category="location">src/app/modules/home-page/login-form/login-form.component.html:12,13</note>
 3271        #      </notes>
 3272        #      <segment>
 3273        #        <source>Password</source>
 3274        #      </segment>
 3275        #    </unit>
 3276        #  </file>
 3277        #</xliff>
 3278
 03279        NS = "urn:oasis:names:tc:xliff:document:2.0"
 03280        NSMAP = {"x": NS}
 03281        base_root = base_file.getroot()
 03282        base_file_element = base_root.find("x:file", namespaces=NSMAP)
 03283        if base_file_element is None:
 03284            raise ValueError("Invalid XLIFF base file: <file> element not found")
 3285
 3286        # Collect base units
 03287        base_units = {
 3288            unit.get("id"): unit
 3289            for unit in base_file_element.findall("x:unit", namespaces=NSMAP)
 3290        }
 03291        base_ids = set(base_units.keys())
 03292        for filepath, lang_tree in language_files.items():
 03293            lang_root = lang_tree.getroot()
 03294            lang_file_element = lang_root.find("x:file", namespaces=NSMAP)
 03295            if lang_file_element is None:
 03296                raise ValueError(f"{filepath}: <file> element not found")
 3297
 3298            # Collect language units
 03299            lang_units = {
 3300                unit.get("id"): unit
 3301                for unit in lang_file_element.findall("x:unit", namespaces=NSMAP)
 3302            }
 03303            lang_ids = set(lang_units.keys())
 3304
 3305            # Remove obsolete units
 03306            obsolete_ids = lang_ids - base_ids
 03307            for unit_id in obsolete_ids:
 03308                lang_file_element.remove(lang_units[unit_id])
 3309
 3310            # Add missing units
 03311            missing_ids = base_ids - lang_ids
 03312            for unit_id in missing_ids:
 03313                new_unit = copy.deepcopy(base_units[unit_id])
 03314                lang_file_element.append(new_unit)
 3315
 3316            # Reorder units to match base order
 03317            current_units = {
 3318                unit.get("id"): unit
 3319                for unit in lang_file_element.findall("x:unit", namespaces=NSMAP)
 3320            }
 03321            for unit in list(lang_file_element.findall("x:unit", namespaces=NSMAP)):
 03322                lang_file_element.remove(unit)
 03323            for unit_id in base_units.keys():
 03324                if unit_id in current_units:
 03325                    lang_file_element.append(current_units[unit_id])
 3326
 3327            #TODO if a translation-unit has the "new"-attribute: set its value from the fallback-language. (if the cultu
 3328
 3329            # Write file back to disk
 03330            ET.register_namespace("", NS)  # Ensure default namespace is declared without prefix
 03331            Path(filepath).write_bytes(
 3332                ET.tostring(
 3333                    lang_tree.getroot(),
 3334                    xml_declaration=True,
 3335                    encoding="UTF-8"
 3336                )
 3337            )
 03338            ScriptCollectionCore().format_xml_file(filepath)
 3339
 13340    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13341    def sync_xlf2_files(self,prefix:str, languages:list[str], folder:str):
 3342        #languages=["de", "fr"] for example. the default-language (usually english) must not be included.
 03343        base_file=os.path.join(folder, f"{prefix}.xlf")
 03344        base_file_xml:ET.ElementTree=ET.parse(base_file)
 03345        GeneralUtilities.assert_condition(self.is_xliff2_file(base_file), f"The base file '{base_file}' is not a valid X
 03346        GeneralUtilities.assert_file_exists(base_file)
 03347        if len(languages)==0:
 03348            raise ValueError("No files provided for syncing.")
 03349        if len(languages)==1:
 03350            return
 03351        language_files_list=[os.path.join(folder, f"{prefix}.{language}.xlf") for language in languages]
 03352        language_files_with_content:dict[str,ET.ElementTree]=dict()
 03353        for language_file in language_files_list:
 03354            GeneralUtilities.assert_file_exists(language_file)
 03355            GeneralUtilities.assert_condition(self.is_xliff2_file(language_file), f"The base file '{base_file}' is not a
 03356            language_files_with_content[language_file]=ET.parse(language_file)
 3357
 3358        #sync existing files
 03359        self.__sync_xlf2_files(base_file_xml, language_files_with_content)
 3360
 3361
 13362    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13363    def translate_xlf_files_in_folder(self, folder: str, base_language: str, libre_translate_api_server: str):
 3364        """Translates all .xlf files directly in the given folder (non-recursive)."""
 03365        pattern = re.compile(r'^.+\.[a-z]{2,3}\.xlf$')
 03366        for filename in os.listdir(folder):
 03367            if not pattern.match(filename):
 03368                continue
 03369            file_path = os.path.join(folder, filename)
 03370            self.translate_xlf_file(file_path, base_language, libre_translate_api_server)
 3371
 13372    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13373    def translate_xlf_file(self, file: str, base_language: str, libre_translate_api_server: str):
 3374        """
 3375        Translates all segments with state='initial' in a XLIFF 2.0 file.
 3376        The target language is extracted from the filename (e.g. 'messages.es.xlf' -> 'es').
 3377        """
 03378        ns_uri = "urn:oasis:names:tc:xliff:document:2.0"
 03379        ns = {"xliff": ns_uri}
 3380
 03381        filename = os.path.basename(file)
 03382        parts = filename.split(".")
 03383        if len(parts) < 3:
 03384            raise ValueError(f"Cannot extract language from filename: {filename}")
 03385        target_language = parts[-2]
 3386
 03387        tree = ET.parse(file)
 03388        root = tree.getroot()
 3389
 03390        for segment in root.findall(".//xliff:segment", ns):
 03391            if segment.get("state", "initial") != "initial":
 03392                continue
 03393            source_el = segment.find("xliff:source", ns)
 03394            if source_el is None or not source_el.text:
 03395                continue
 3396
 03397            translated_text = self.translate(source_el.text, base_language, target_language, libre_translate_api_server)
 3398
 03399            target_el = segment.find("xliff:target", ns)
 03400            if target_el is None:
 03401                target_el = ET.SubElement(segment, f"{{{ns_uri}}}target")
 3402
 03403            target_el.text = translated_text
 03404            segment.set("state", "translated")
 3405
 03406        ET.register_namespace("", ns_uri)
 03407        xml_bytes = ET.tostring(root, encoding="utf-8", xml_declaration=True)
 03408        with open(file, "wb") as f:
 03409            f.write(xml_bytes)
 3410
 13411    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13412    def translate(self, content: str, source_language: str, target_language: str, libre_translate_api_server: str) -> st
 3413        """Translates text using the LibreTranslate API."""
 03414        url = f"{libre_translate_api_server.rstrip('/')}/translate"
 03415        if "-" in source_language:
 03416            source_language=source_language.split("-")[0]
 03417        if "-" in target_language:
 03418            target_language=target_language.split("-")[0]
 03419        payload = {
 3420            "q": content,
 3421            "source": source_language,
 3422            "target": target_language,
 3423            "format": "text"
 3424        }
 03425        response = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=30)
 03426        response.raise_for_status()
 03427        return response.json()["translatedText"]
 3428
 13429    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13430    def detect_language(self, content: str, libre_translate_api_server: str) -> str:
 3431        """Detects the language of the given text using the LibreTranslate API."""
 03432        url = f"{libre_translate_api_server.rstrip('/')}/detect"
 03433        payload = {"q": content}
 03434        response = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=30)
 03435        response.raise_for_status()
 03436        results = response.json()
 03437        if not results:
 03438            raise ValueError("Language detection returned no results.")
 03439        return results[0]["language"]
 3440
 13441    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13442    def get_all_files_in_git_repository(self,repository_folder:str,ignore_ignored_files:bool=True,include_submodules: bo
 3443        """Returns a list of all files in a git-repository."""
 03444        cmd = ["ls-files", "--cached"]
 03445        if ignore_ignored_files:
 03446            cmd.append("--exclude-standard")
 03447        if include_submodules:
 03448            cmd.append("--recurse-submodules")
 03449        output=self.run_program_argsasarray("git", cmd,repository_folder)
 03450        files = [ GeneralUtilities.normalize_path("./" + line) for line in output[1].splitlines()if line.strip() ]
 03451        return files
 3452
 13453    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13454    def write_file_list_for_repository(self,repository_folder:str,target_file:str="./FileList.txt",ignore_ignored_files:
 03455        if not os.path.isabs(target_file):
 03456            target_file=GeneralUtilities.resolve_relative_path(target_file,repository_folder)
 03457        target_file=GeneralUtilities.normalize_path(target_file)
 03458        files=[path.replace("\\","/") for path in self.get_all_files_in_git_repository(repository_folder,ignore_ignored_
 03459        GeneralUtilities.ensure_file_exists(target_file)
 03460        GeneralUtilities.write_lines_to_file(target_file, files)
 3461
 13462    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13463    def get_all_commits_in_git_repository(self,repository_folder:str,include_all_heads:bool=False) -> list[str]:
 3464        """Returns a textual visualization of all commits in a git-repository."""
 3465        #do 'git log --reverse --all --pretty=format:"%ci | %H | %cn <%ce> | %d | %s"'
 03466        args = ["log", "--reverse", "--pretty=format:%ci | %H | %cn <%ce> | %D | %s"]
 03467        if include_all_heads:
 03468            args.append("--all")
 03469        result=self.run_program_argsasarray("git", args, repository_folder, throw_exception_if_exitcode_is_not_zero=True
 03470        output= result[1]
 03471        result=output.splitlines()
 03472        return result
 3473
 13474    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13475    def write_commit_list_for_repository(self,repository_folder:str,target_file:str,include_all_heads:bool=False) -> Non
 03476        if os.path.isabs(target_file):
 03477            target_file=GeneralUtilities.resolve_relative_path(target_file,repository_folder)
 03478        target_file=GeneralUtilities.normalize_path(target_file)
 03479        commits=self.get_all_commits_in_git_repository(repository_folder, include_all_heads)
 03480        GeneralUtilities.ensure_file_exists(target_file)
 03481        GeneralUtilities.write_lines_to_file(target_file, commits)

 13483    @GeneralUtilities.check_arguments
 13484    def is_runnning_in_container(self) ->bool:
 3485        """this function is based on a convention and does not do a real check."""
 03486        return os.environ.get("ISRUNNINGINCONTAINER") == "true"
